title: bagad #0898
definition:
1) to act treacherously, deceitfully, deal treacherously
    1a) (Qal) to act or deal treacherously, faithlessly, deceitfully,
        offend
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to act or deal treacherously, faithlessly, deceitfully,
        offend
